title: What is Vizibl
content: Vizibl is a meta-DSP that unifies access to multiple leading programmatic advertising platforms into a single intuitive interface. Advertisers can activate campaigns across display, video, audio, CTV, DOOH, and Amazon inventory without managing multiple DSP contracts or meeting individual platform spend thresholds. Vizibl removes operational complexity while unlocking the strengths of each underlying DSP.

title: Why a Meta-DSP Model
content: No single DSP performs equally well across all funnel stages, verticals, and geographies. Managing multiple DSPs independently creates contract complexity, fragmented reporting, duplicated efforts, and compliance burden. Vizibl eliminates this trade-off by orchestrating multiple DSPs from one seat, enabling right-DSP selection per funnel stage while maintaining unified reporting and control.

title: Vizibl as a Datawrkz Product
content: Vizibl is a product built by Datawrkz, a global adtech company with 250+ digital experts across the USA, UK, India, and Singapore. Datawrkz specializes in transparent, outcome-driven digital advertising and operates both advertiser and publisher technology solutions. Vizibl benefits from Datawrkz’s deep expertise in programmatic buying, retail data partnerships, compliance management, and multi-market execution.

title: DSPs Available via Vizibl
content: Vizibl provides unified access to leading DSPs including The Trade Desk, Amazon DSP, and Freewheel formerly Beeswax. This allows advertisers to leverage Amazon’s first party shopping signals, The Trade Desk’s omnichannel scale and UID 2.0 identity framework, and Beeswax’s log level transparency and PMP flexibility within one consolidated interface.

title: Supported Ad Formats and Channels
content: Vizibl supports display banners, rich media HTML5 creatives, video including in-stream and out-stream, audio advertising, CTV or OTT advertising, and Digital Out-of-Home advertising.

title: Foundational Targeting
content: Foundational targeting includes demographic targeting such as age, gender, income, life stage, geographic targeting including country, city, and radius targeting, lifestyle and interest targeting, lookalike modeling, and retargeting.

title: Advanced Targeting Capabilities
content: Vizibl enables advanced targeting using retail media data, Amazon first party signals, contextual targeting, weather triggers, global third party data segments, CRM onboarding using Bring Your Own Audience, geofencing, and lifestyle based placements.

title: Granular Delivery Controls
content: Advertisers can refine delivery using device and operating system targeting, inventory type targeting such as web or app environments, domain allowlists and blocklists, dayparting controls, and dynamic audience expansion.

title: Vizibl CDP and Proprietary Pixels
content: Vizibl includes proprietary CDP pixels that capture privacy safe behavioral signals across website visits, CRM activity, ad engagement, and cross-device touchpoints. The CDP enables custom segment creation, recency and frequency analysis, funnel drop off identification, and audience activation into DSP campaigns.

title: Future-Proof Identity with UID 2.0
content: Through The Trade Desk integration Vizibl supports UID 2.0, a privacy safe identity framework built on encrypted consent based first party identifiers such as email or phone.

title: Retail Media and Shopper Data
content: Vizibl provides access to deterministic retail and commerce data from major retail partners across the US and EU. Advertisers can target verified shoppers, category buyers, and purchase intent segments.

title: AI Driven Optimization
content: Vizibl optimizes campaigns through efficiency optimization such as placement, device, geography, environment, and performance optimization such as automated budget allocation toward high performing line items.

title: Unified Reporting and Transparency
content: Vizibl offers real time dashboards and downloadable reports across domains, geographies, audience segments, devices, and conversion events.

title: Pricing Model
content: Vizibl has no minimum spend requirements and no long term lock ins. Self Serve users pay a platform fee as a percentage of ad spend. Managed Services users pay the platform fee plus an additional service fee.

title: Service Models
content: Vizibl offers Self Serve, Managed Services, and Hybrid models.

title: Compliance and Regulated Inventory
content: Vizibl adheres to GDPR and region specific regulations. The platform supports compliant inventory for regulated verticals including iGaming, pharma, alcohol, and political advertising.

title: iGaming Use Case
content: Vizibl enables iGaming operators to reduce acquisition costs using intent based targeting, regulated inventory access, geo specific compliance guidance, optimized publisher selection, and retention focused retargeting strategies.

title: Do you have CPA traffic
content: No, the buying of inventory happens on CPM basis but the campaigns can be optimized for CPL using our AI models.

title: What are your traffic sources
content: We have partnership with 65+ SSPs which give us access to almost all the inventory.

title: Can you work on CPA, Rev Share or Hybrid cost models
content: The platform buying happens only on CPM basis.

title: Do you have case studies of working with other iGaming operators
content: IGaming section on this page - https://www.vizibl.ai/casestudies/

title: What are the minimum spends
content: We have no minimum spends. However we recommend to get started with more than $5000.

title: How long should I test for
content: The platform usually takes 2-3 months on constant stream of data to learn and optimize the campaigns.

title: Do you use pre pay or post pay
content: Pre-pay model at the start, could make Post pay depending on Spends and consistency. Reach out to your Account Manager for more details.

title: What are the fees
content: 12% of standard platform fee, negotiable based on spends.

title: Is it a self serve platform
content: We have both Managed serve and self serve platforms depending upon your needs you can select whatever works for you.

title: Can I have a managed service
content: Yes, please reach out to sales@vizibl.ai for more details.

title: Do you offer discounts or rebates
content: Reach out to your Account Manager for more details.

title: What client verticals do you work with
content: Agency, iGaming, Property, QSR, Retail, Financial Services, Ecommerce Publishers.

title: Do you see strong last click conversions
content: Programmatic is primarily awareness channel which is used to ignite interest in the user lead user to buy the product or service in future.

title: Where can I register
content: Please reach out to sales@vizibl.ai for more details.

title: How do we integrate
content: Please reach out to sales@vizibl.ai for more details.

title: Can we do S2S tracking
content: Yes, we do support Server to server tracking using Auction or Click Ids.

title: What is the source of truth
content: We have conversion tracking available to the platform where you can select view through and click through conversion windows.

title: Do you have a user guide
content: Agency onboarding Guide and Advertiser Onboarding Guide.

title: Can you do retargeting
content: Yes, we can do retargeting buy using Segment Pixels to collect various signals. We also support First-party data like Emails, Phone numbers, IPs, MAIDs.

title: Can you give us any benchmarks
content: Please reach out to sales@vizibl.ai for more details.

title: What CTV inventory sources do you have
content: https://www.vizibl.ai/demand-side-platform-connected-tv-advertising/

title: Do you have a reporting API
content: Yes, we support reporting APIs.

title: Can you work with Afficka and other affiliate platforms
content: Please reach out to sales@vizibl.ai for more details.

title: Can you work with ad tags
content: Yes, please reach out to sales@vizibl.ai for more details.

title: Can you run ads in-app
content: Yes, we have a lot of in-app inventory.

title: Can I build a whitelist or inclusion list of sites
content: Yes, we allow whitelist or blocklist which can be used by advertisers.

title: Will you be providing us support
content: Yes, someone from our Customer Success team will be in constant touch with you.

title: Pin code and geo fencing targeting
content: Yes, we can do as narrow as 50 meters radius targeting.

title: Third party data providers
content: Key providers include Lotame, Acxiom, ZoomInfo, and Nielsen.

title: Do you run iGaming Crypto or Casino
content: Yes, we support iGaming, Crypto, and Casino campaigns.

title: GDPR compliance
content: Yes, Vizibl adheres to GDPR compliance.

title: Managed services scope
content: Managed services include dedicated account manager, campaign setup, optimization, reporting, and onboarding.

title: Account activation time
content: It usually takes up to 24 hours for us to activate the advertiser account after signing up.

title: Display and Video Advertising Inventory
content: Bloomberg, Daily Mail, Tripadvisor, CNN, GQ, Reuters, Condé Nast, Fox, Variety, USA Today, The New Yorker, and more.

title: Audio Advertising Inventory
content: Spotify, Amazon Music, Deezer, Acast, SoundCloud, iHeartRadio, and more.

title: Digital Out of Home Inventory
content: JCDecaux, ECN, DAX, Bauer Media, Smart Outdoor, Blue Billboard, and more.

title: CTV Advertising Inventory
content: Netflix, Sky, ESPN, Channel 4, Disney+, HBO Max, Prime Video, and more.

title: Amazon Advertising Inventory
content: Amazon, Twitch, Prime Video, Fire TV, IMDb, Alexa, and more.

title: Social Media Platforms
content: Vizibl is not a social media platform and you cannot advertise on Facebook, Instagram, Snapchat, YouTube etc. Vizibl focuses on programmatic advertising inventory.

title: How to Contact Vizibl Sales
content: To get started with Vizibl, request a demo, discuss Managed Services, confirm inventory availability, or explore custom campaign requirements, advertisers can reach out directly to sales@vizibl.ai.
